arts.ttl: Nagelsmann reveals plan to start either Kleindienst or Burkardt against Bosnia-Herzegovina
arts.sum: Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann has practically confirmed that either Tim Kleindienst or Jonathan Burkardt will start up front against Bosnia-Herzegovina.

arts.ttl: Julian Nagelsmann on the amount of injuries in the Germany squad: “I don’t want to constantly complain about the schedule”
arts.sum: Speaking at his pre-match press conference (via @iMiaSanMia) ahead of Germany’s Nations League game against Bosnia and Herzegovina, head coach Julian Nagelsmann has commented on the about of injuries in…

arts.ttl: Lukas Podolski: a Bundesliga and Germany legend
arts.sum: Lukas Podolski is a Bundesliga legend having starred for Cologne and Bayern Munich in the German top flight while also earning himself a place in his nation's football history for his part of the 2014 FIFA World Cup win. At the start of the 2003/04 season, the 18-year-old Podolski was still part of the club's youth set-up — scoring eight times in the opening eight games for the U19 side — to catch Koller's eye.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Arsenal pursuit of Florian Wirtz takes major hit following most recent development
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz no doubt could have his pick of top teams next summer if he desires, but the clubs after his signature may have to bide their time. The 21-year-old has a reported asking price of €125m, yet even that may not be enough. arts.ttl: Germany explodes: Klopp “as fake as his teeth”
arts.sum: German fans and journalists have swiftly and overwhelmingly condemned Jürgen Klopp’s decision to become Red Bull’s new Global Head of Football starting January 1, 2025. Fans now accuse Klopp of betraying the traditional football values he once championed, by aligning with clubs that represent the opposite.
